title.en: However, they pondered for a long time and did ...

content.en:
Kwai couldn't beat Ye Tian, and the Golden Ancient Demon couldn't think of how to let other emperors defeat Ye Tian.

Wei must not be able to count on it, and he will not be looking for reinforcements?

The Shuiyang Department has a good relationship with their Golden God Department, so they are willing to support, but other tribes are unwilling.

If you want to invite the existence of the top twenty on the emperor list, the Golden God Department can't pay that price, and people don't care about the Golden God Ministry.

After all, that kind of demon, I'm afraid that only the ultimate ancient demon can teach it, how can people care about the Golden God Department with only one peak-level ancient demon!

Seeing that there was no way to destroy the ancient demons, the other ancient demon-level existences were very unwilling.

Could it be that if they really want to let the Dragon Disciple Tribe occupy the territory of the Golden God Department, wouldn't their Golden God Department have to completely decline?

Moreover, after leaving this territory, the Golden God Department has to re-search for the territory, which will undoubtedly clash with other forces, or the Golden God Department only occupies a small area, and perhaps other forces will not fight with the Golden God Ministry. 04 But this is the territory of the Golden God Ministry, and they naturally don't want to give up!

However, they pondered for a long time and did not come up with a solution.

......

Tribe of Dragons.

At this moment, the Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon and several other Ancient Demon-level existences were very excited, after all, they felt that the hope of victory in this war was too great.

As long as they win, the original territory of the Golden God Department belongs to the Dragon Disciple Tribe, and their Dragon Disciple Tribe will completely ban the status of the Golden God Ministry.

And those affiliated tribes were also excited, they chose the right dragon tribe.

Of course, what they are most grateful to is Ye Tian, if it weren't for Ye Tian, they wouldn't see hope at all.

Although the major tribes suffered heavy losses in this war, as long as they won and occupied resources, they could still re-cultivate emperor-level existence in the future, and they could rise, even far beyond the present.

So, it's all worth it!

......

Eagle Ministry.

He Lao heard about the things on the battlefield, he didn't know anything about Wei and Aoi, and he might not even have heard of any emperor list, but he knew Ye Tian's current strength, killing the top emperor level was as simple as crushing an ant, and he swept all the emperor levels of the Golden God Department with his own strength, and the real emperor-level invincible existence was suddenly very pleasantly surprised.

And Ye Tian's achievements gradually spread, letting the entire Eagle Department know.

"It's so powerful now!!"

Sui was extremely shocked, he couldn't praise Ye Tian with any words, it was already a level that he couldn't imagine.

......

After Ye Tian defeated Aoi, he was not so excited, and he continued to retreat and cultivate after that.

After all, for him, he still has room for improvement.

No matter how powerful Aoi is, he is only the thirty-sixth on the emperor list, and there are many people who are stronger than him, and there may even be some emperors who are stronger than Aoi, and they are not on the emperor list.

Maybe the existence that ranked first or second on the emperor list could kill an emperor like Aoi in seconds, so he didn't have the slightest degree of pride.

Besides, he was originally the ultimate supreme being, an ancient demon-level existence, but he crossed the ultimate time and space, his consciousness descended into this era, and he started cultivating all over again, so he had nothing to be proud of.

And this time he killed too many emperors, and he also defeated Aoi, so he naturally gained a lot of achievements.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used these achievements to exchange a large amount of resources, which were mainly used to improve his cultivation.

His current cultivation is far from reaching the limit of the emperor level, so he naturally has to continue to improve.

With these resources, his cultivation was even faster.

Of course, he also continued to cultivate the True Lin Form and the Ultimate Rule Realm Prototype, and his strength was constantly improving in every direction.

Time flies.

One ancient demon era after another has passed, and during this time, another emperor-level existence of the Dragon Disciple Tribe has broken through to the ancient demon level.

At the same time, there is also a Sky Devouring Demon Dragon that has broken through to the ancient demon level, which is naturally with the assistance of Proz.

In other words, there are two more ancient demon-level combat powers on the side of the dragon department all of a sudden.

Of course.

No matter how many ancient demon levels there are, they are not allowed to participate in the battle.

But now, the Golden God Department is still unable to compete with the Dragon Disciple Tribe in the Qinghuan Abyss, and those emperor-level and king-level have all fled, if it continues like this, the Golden God Department will be tantamount to admitting defeat.

Therefore, every once in a while, the Golden God Department at least sent a few emperor-level people in, indicating that they did not admit defeat.

But in this way, the Golden God Department has to send an emperor-level fall every once in a while.

I don't know, it's very close to the Ten Thousand Ancient Demon Era.

At this time, the Golden God Department has completely given up, they are rapidly collecting the resources of the major territories, even if they lose their territory, they don't want to give these territories intact to the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

In this regard, the dragon disciple tribe has no choice but to try to prevent the destruction of the Golden God Tribe.

However, the overall strength of the Golden God Department is still superior to that of the Dragon Disciple Tribe, and those ancient demon levels do not need to fight, but if they seize the resources and leave, the Dragon Disciple Tribe will not be able to stop them.

Finally, the time of the 10,000 Ancient Demon Era has arrived.

The Golden God Department was completely defeated, and then prepared to relocate and leave here.

And Proz, who had been practicing in retreat, came out of the customs and personally led the dragon tribe to the Golden God Department.

"Golden Slayer Ancient Demon, you should leave 567!"

Ploz said coldly.

"Plotz, we're leaving this time, we'll be back later!"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon said coldly.

In their agreement, it is only that for a certain period of time, the Golden God Department is not allowed to invade this territory again, but once the time passes, they can invade here and regain the territory.

Of course, at that time, maybe the dragon tribe was strong enough to fight against the Golden God Tribe.

Rumble!!!!

The dragon tribe began to migrate, and the dense emperor-level, king-level, general-level, and soldier-level clansmen rode large mounts and fortresses through the void and left.

And the Golden God Department only left a pile of ruins and empty shells, and no treasures were left.

However, the ultimate particle energy here is extremely rich, and it is still a good place to serve as a headquarters.

In the days that followed, the Dragonswalk tribe set up their headquarters here.

Then, the leaders of the many tribes began to gather to discuss the division of the territory.

After all, the war is won, and the next thing is to reap the benefits.

And the Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon Capital has made an oath with many tribes, so naturally it will not break the contract.

Soon, the Dragon Shadow Tribe divided pieces of territory to these tribes, and the Eagle Department took the most credit this time, receiving a large number of territory and resource rewards.
